permission.android:label: Advertising ID notification
permission.android:description: Allows an app to receive a notification when the advertising ID or limit ad tracking preference of the user is updated.

permission.android:label: Advertising ID Permission
permission.android:description: Allows a publisher app to access a valid advertising ID directly or indirectly.

permission.android:label: Inject Gesture Event Permission
permission.android:description: Allows an app to inject gesture event created on its own.

permission.android:label: car fuel level
permission.android:description: Access your car's fuel level information

permission.android:label: car vendor channel
permission.android:description: Access your car's vendor channel to exchange car-specific information

permission.android:label: activity recognition
permission.android:description: Allows an app to receive periodic updates of your activity level from Google, for example, if you are walking, driving, cycling, or stationary.

permission.android:label: receive data from Internet
permission.android:description: Allows apps to accept cloud to device messages sent by the app's service. Using this service will incur data usage. Malicious apps could cause excess data usage.

permission.android:label: Broadcast data messages to apps.
permission.android:description: Can broadcast data messages received from the Internet to apps registered to listen for them.

permission.android:label: Modify Google settings
permission.android:description: Allows this app to modify Google settings.

permission.android:label: Exchanges messages and receives sync notifications from Google servers.
permission.android:description: Used for server cloud to device messages and for sync notifications. Google Talk uses this service to exchange messages and to synchronize presence status. Malicious apps could use this service to transmit excess data.

permission.android:label: read Google service configuration
permission.android:description: Allows this app to read Google service configuration data.

permission.android:label: Modify Google service configuration
permission.android:description: Allows this app to modify Google service configuration data.

permission.android:label: Send broadcasts to Android Market.
permission.android:description: Can send broadcasts to Android Market requesting app installation and removal.

activity.android:label: To manage your Google account settings, please visit myaccount.google.com from a web browser.

meta-data.android:resource: Choose the activities and info you allow Google to save
Choose the activities and info you allow Google to save
Manage device data used to show you ads
Manage ads personalization on this device

receiver.android:label: Family Link parental controls
receiver.android:description: By allowing supervision, you give your parents the ability to manage and monitor your Google Account and supervisable devices.

activity.android:label: Сповіщення про повітряні тривоги в Україні
Сповіщення про повітряні тривоги в Україні

activity-alias.android:label: Сповіщення про повітряні тривоги в Україні

meta-data.android:resource:
When Location Accuracy is on, apps and services get a more accurate location. To do this, Google periodically processes information about device sensors and wireless signals from your device to crowdsource wireless signal locations. These are used without identifying you to improve location accuracy and location-based services, and to improve, provide, and maintain Google’s services based on Google’s and third parties’ legitimate interests to serve users’ needs.
Learn more about location settings at g.co/android/location

When Location Accuracy is on, apps and services get a more accurate location. To do this, Google periodically processes information about device sensors and wireless signals from your device to crowdsource wireless signal locations. These are used without identifying you to improve location accuracy and location-based services, and to improve, provide, and maintain Google’s services based on Google’s and third parties’ legitimate interests to serve users’ needs.
See details about the services used on your device

activity.android:label: Sign in to your Google Accounts
This device isn’t Play Protect certified
Create a Google Account to help keep your data private
Apps may not work as expected

receiver.android:label: Screen lock service
receiver.android:description: Allow apps to determine the quality of the device's screen lock

meta-data.android:resource: Back up data to your Google Account
Back up data, bring data from another device
Lock device’s screen if theft is detected
Lock device’s screen if theft is detected
Lock device’s screen if theft is detected
Lock device’s screen if theft is detected
Get alerts about threats from dangerous websites
Get alerts about threats from dangerous websites
Get alerts about threats from dangerous websites
Get alerts about threats from dangerous websites

receiver.android:label: Find Hub
receiver.android:description: Allow Find Hub to lock or erase a lost device

meta-data.android:resource: Keep your device unlocked while it's on you
Share data to help improve Android
Save payment info to your Google Account for easier online checkout
Save payment info to your Google Account for easier online checkout
Pay with your phone in stores
Activate a card to start enjoying faster, safer checkout in stores
Reactivate card to pay in stores
Get your new phone set up to pay in stores
Get helpful suggestions from your apps and services based on your usual activities and locations.

service.android:description: This service allows Google Play Services to Push Provision cards to Google Wallet
